title: Learn Yourself
description: Journaling is the best method to stay consistent. At least once a week clears the mind from doubt, paranoia, and distractions

title: the goddamn phone
description: Honestly, the biggest struggle is not controlling yourself when youre down, its the urge to pick it up once youre at the top. No, you didnt do enough. You must avoid the devil's trap of bringing you down.

title: Observation
description: when you overcome your demons, you start seeing the struggle of others have with theirs.

title: Get Busy
description: Life turned around as soon as i got busy. Wake up at 6, swimming at 7, coaching at 9 and school at 11. Spend time in school with study and football. Sneak past mom to go to the gym as soon as arriving home. Come back, study, work. Work till 2am. Sleep. Wake up. Truely an unforgettable phase.
